# Tinyperm 3

**Summary**: A portable handheld permeameter used for field or lab measurements of rock permeability.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-allehyani|allehyani, 2024]] used TinyPerm3 to measure permeability in both host rock matrix and burrow fillings.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The TinyPerm3 shows good agreement with the AutoScan system in the low-permeability range, but may overestimate values above 250 mD. ([[2024-allehyani|allehyani, 2024, p. 104]])
